name: museic-app
description: Museic desktop app (Electron): feed UI + Presage capture + Auth0 native login

scripts.package: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder
scripts.package:win: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Museic uses your camera (via Presage SmartSpectra) to measure your physiological reaction to music. Without this permission, reaction capture silently fails.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Some camera pipelines request microphone access; Museic does not record audio.
